name: Build Chrome Dino Game Clone
description: Create a complete Chrome dinosaur game clone with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

steps.title: Plan game architecture
steps.description: Design the game architecture including game loop structure, entity system, rendering approach, and input handling. Define the core classes and their relationships.
steps.expected_output: A detailed architecture document with class diagrams, game loop design, and component breakdown

steps.title: Write HTML/CSS/JS game foundation
steps.description: Implement the base game with HTML5 canvas, game loop, dinosaur character with jump mechanics, ground scrolling, and basic rendering
steps.expected_output: A working HTML file with canvas-based game showing a jumping dinosaur on scrolling ground

steps.title: Add collision detection
steps.description: Implement obstacle generation (cacti and pterodactyls) with hitbox-based collision detection. Add game over state and restart functionality.
steps.expected_output: Game with randomly spawning obstacles, accurate collision detection, and game over/restart flow

steps.title: Add scoring system
steps.description: Implement distance-based scoring, high score persistence using localStorage, speed progression, day/night cycle, and sound effects
steps.expected_output: Complete game with score display, high score tracking, increasing difficulty, and visual polish

steps.title: Test and review
steps.description: Play-test the game for bugs, review code quality, check performance on different screen sizes, and suggest improvements
steps.expected_output: A review document with identified issues, performance notes, and suggested enhancements
